document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Deep Fox and Foxtrot project in Canada dated December, 2021.pdf
document.description: The report provides a detailed technical assessment of the Deep Fox and Foxtrot rare earth element (REE) deposits in Labrador, Canada, including geology, mineral resources, and exploration potential.
